name: Eval & Regression Framework
owns: Benchmark scenarios, regression gates, production scoring feedback loops
must_never: Run evals against live production credentials or state
Accept a scenario without RTM linkage as traced
Score a governance-degraded pass as a clean pass
Let compliance-domain scenario failures pass silently
notes: Brian's additions: C10/C17 governance signals as eval signals (effective_passed requires governance_clean). RTM coverage metadata per eval suite (components, requirements, metrics). Compliance gates require 100% pass. Production failures become regression scenarios.
